name: Mark a part as Assembly enables BOM tab
steps:
Given a part 'Controller Board' exists and is not currently marked as Assembly
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Controller Board'
When the user edits the part and checks the 'Assembly' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part detail page for 'Controller Board' displays the 'BOM' tab

name: Mark a part as Component makes it available in Used In and Allocated tabs
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' exists and is not currently marked as Component
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
When the user edits the part and checks the 'Component' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k' displays both the 'Used In' tab and the 'Allocated' tab

name: Mark a part as Purchaseable enables Suppliers and Purchase Orders tabs
steps:
Given a part 'IC Regulator LM7805' exists and is not currently marked as Purchaseable
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'IC Regulator LM7805'
When the user edits the part and checks the 'Purchaseable' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part detail page for 'IC Regulator LM7805' displays the 'Suppliers' tab and the 'Purchase Orders' tab

name: Mark a part as Salable makes it available on sales orders
steps:
Given a part 'Finished Product A' exists and is not currently marked as Salable
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Finished Product A'
When the user edits the part and checks the 'Salable' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part 'Finished Product A' can be added to a sales order line item and the 'Sales Orders' tab is visible on the part detail page

name: Mark a part as Virtual
steps:
Given a part 'Labor Cost' exists and is not currently marked as Virtual
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Labor Cost'
When the user edits the part and checks the 'Virtual' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part detail page for 'Labor Cost' shows the 'Virtual' attribute as enabled and the Stock tab is hidden
